name: FIND ALL 3: Travel
short_description: Look for hidden cats, raccoons, other animals and objects, color this painted world. You have to go on an exciting journey through different levels. More than 1500 items of varying difficulty are waiting for you!
detailed_description:
❤ COMING SOON ❤


About the Game

Embark on a journey through a fascinating, hand-drawn world to find all the hidden cats, raccoons, birds and many more different items.
By finding lost items you will color this world.

Game Features:
- Over 1500 different items to find
- different levels
- Difficulty levels
- Search both outside and inside
- A train! :)
- Level Coloring
- 2.5D effect

supported_languages: English, Simplified Chinese, Russian, Japanese, Dutch, Norwegian, Polish, Czech, French, Irish
